_comment: Worked examples for the .curator/config.json preset shape. The default config ships with three presets (claude, codex, gemini) — copy a block below into your config's `presets` map (or replace one) and either flip `active_preset` to its name or set `CURATOR_PRESET=<name>` in the shell launching the CLI. Per-preset keys override top-level values when that preset is active, so `parallel_workers` etc. can be tuned per backend.

_ollama_fully_local._note: Local-model quality is lower — drop parallel_workers so individual waves stay within the model's effective context and expect more score_diff rejections. Requires an Ollama-compatible coding-agent CLI (Continue.dev, Cody, or Claude Code via an OpenAI-compatible proxy). Run `ollama serve` locally and `ollama pull` both models first.

_mixed_local_worker_cloud_reviewer._note: Keep local inference for the high-volume worker role; use a strong cloud reviewer once per wave. Reduces cost and data exposure while keeping judgment quality up.

_openai_split_tier._note: Replace the default `codex` preset with this if/when a judgment-heavier OpenAI tier is the right reviewer match for your workspace.
